name: White Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine buttermilk and baking soda in a 3-quart heavy saucepan. Use a Dutch oven for this.
2. Let stand 20 minutes.
3. Add sugar and light corn syrup to the buttermilk. Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
4. When the mixture boils, add butter and cook, stirring occasionally (stir from the bottom slowly) until it reaches the soft ball stage (236-238°F). It will turn a medium brown color.
5. Remove from heat and cool to lukewarm (110°F).
6. Beat until the mixture loses its gloss and starts to thicken. Stir in chopped pecans.
7. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan. Cool until firm, then cut into 36 pieces.
Makes 1 1/2 lbs.
